title: Ornith (35B,9B) + Hermes,Zed: THE FULLY PRIVATE LOCAL AGENT is ACTUALLY HERE!
summary: Ornith is a new family of open agentic coding models from DeepReinforce, ranging from 9B to 397B parameters. Built on Gemma and Qwen, the models are designed for coding, tool use, and agentic workflows with support for reasoning tags and tool-call blocks. The 35B and 9B variants are optimized for local machine deployment in GGUF format.
writeup: The video covers Ornith, a new open agentic coding model family from DeepReinforce that spans 9B to 397B parameters and is built on Gemma and Qwen bases. The models target coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, with support for reasoning tags and tool-call blocks. The 35B and 9B variants are optimized for local deployment in GGUF format, which enables running an agent on a private local machine. The reference to Hermes and Zed points to pairing these models with a coding agent setup.
